changelog: v3.5.0: Redesigned home page with visual 1-2-3 workflow (Detect > Automate > Guide), bottleneck-driven Recommended Steps card, consolidated Quick Actions with maintenance, and tighter above-the-fold layout. Renamed Tuning Priority to Bottleneck Analysis and FAST Score to FAST Benchmark throughout. Added SMBIOS UUID and MachineGuid to HWID fingerprint to fix collisions. Fixed iGPU/dGPU mix-up on benchmark card for Optimus laptops. Added Storage guidance for game install location and RAID. Implemented script safety guards, UI guidance improvements, and optimization drift detection. Added opt-in Fortnite FPS sync and energy-saving toggles.
